response_raw: { "mode": "human", "topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.", "opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential for false information and to verify the accuracy of what you see online. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential for false information and to verify the accuracy of what you see online. Here are some steps you can take: 1) Be cautious of sensational or unverified claims that seem too good (or bad) to be true. 2) Look for corroboration from multiple sources before accepting a claim as true. 3) Use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the accuracy of information. 4) Consider the source of the information and whether it is credible. 5) Be mindful of your own biases and try to approach information with an open mind. By following these steps, you can better manage and deal with fake content on social media and make informed decisions based on accurate information.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: <step-by-step derivations> 1. Identify potential sources of false information and be cautious of sensational or unverified claims. 2. Verify the accuracy of information by cross-checking with multiple credible sources. 3. Use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the authenticity of information. 4. Evaluate the credibility of the source of the information and consider potential biases. 5. Approach information with an open mind and be willing to change your beliefs if presented with compelling evidence.
response_parsed.tone: <derived from persona traits> Anxious, detail-oriented and analytical
